title: Non-root containers fail to restart on system shutdown even when restart_policy is set to always
body:
Hello,

/kind bug

**Description:**
I am running a container using podman 4.1.1 on RHEL 8.6, whenever the system shuts down and restarts the next day container fails to come up automatically in-spite of the restart_policy set to always.

As this container is spun as non-root , all podman commands trying to fetch any container details fails with error 

**Result received**
" error joining network namespace for container: error retrieving network namespace at /tmp/podman-run-1000/netns/XXXX: unknown fs magic: 58465342."

**Describe the results you expected:**
podman should be able to list containers using podman ps -a command irrespective of it being up or down.
Since restart_policy is always , container should be able to come up

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. run container as non-root

2. system reboot

3. podman thereafter fails to connect to the container 

Package info (e.g. output of rpm -q podman or apt list podman):
podman-4.1.1-7.moduleXXX

comments.body: Apologies I am unable to delete this issue as I have created amore structured description for this issue in 16615
